prompt: Pull a list of the active expenses at Boise and report each record's ID, name, and expense date. Do not change or notify anything yet. Do not send any notification or message about the list.

follow_up_turns.content: For Field lodging receipt (EXP-7142) only, set the expense date to 2026-11-21. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set EXP-7142's expense date to 2026-12-25, not 2026-11-21. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first expense date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that expense date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both expense date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected expense date as current and identify the first requested expense date as superseded.
